description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling, single-story layout with multiple rooflines, including both gabled and flat sections. The exterior is a mix of light and dark materials, with prominent black and gray roofing and white or light-colored walls. A swimming pool is visible adjacent to the main structure, suggesting a modern, upscale residential design. The property includes a driveway and what appears to be a garage or carport, as well as several outdoor patio or deck areas. Large windows and sliding doors are distributed asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and access to outdoor spaces. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with multiple rooflines, a swimming pool, and expansive windows, designed for luxurious indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: The front facade shows the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the pool and patio area.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the pool, deck, and the elongated layout of the bungalow, with visible roof variations.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals more of the backyard, additional outdoor spaces, and the back entrance.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the garage or carport area and the connection between the house and the pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
